channel.title: Ashwood Chronicles
channel.description: Ancient stories. Quiet hours. Sleep well, wherever you are tonight.
channel.itunes:author: Mr. Ashwood

item.title: a Children and her golden retriever contemplating infinity
item.description:
# Ashwood Chronicles: The Hours - A Children and Her Golden Retriever Contemplating Infinity
Throughout history, children have sought comfort in the quiet companionship of animals, finding in their presence a mirror to mysteries beyond words. Golden retrievers, beloved for their gentle wisdom and steady hearts, have long served as silent philosophers in the domestic landscape. Tonight, you are there.
The audio features binaural beats tuned to sleep frequencies, designed to guide your mind toward deeper rest as the scene unfolds around you.
#AshlwoodChronicles #SleepContent #TheHours #GoldenRetriever #ContemplativeAudio #SleepStories #BinaurnalBeats
If you would like to return to these hours — you know where to find us.

item.title: an incredible and powerful border collie dream
item.description:
# Ashwood Chronicles: The Hours - An Incredible and Powerful Border Collie Dream
Border collies have long been regarded as among the most intelligent of all dog breeds, their keen eyes and graceful movements the product of centuries of selective breeding in the Scottish Borders. These remarkable animals have served as faithful companions to shepherds, their instincts honed through generations to read the subtle language of flocks and fields. Tonight, you are there.
The audio features gentle binaural beats and sleep frequencies designed to guide you deeper into restful slumber.
#AshwoodChronicles #SleepStories #ThereHours #BorderCollie #SleepAudio #NarratedSleep #RelaxationMusic
If you would like to return to these hours — you know where to find us.

item.title: a black cat reading at the candle lights
item.description:
# The Hours: A Black Cat Reading at the Candlelights
In the quieter corners of Victorian drawing rooms, a certain kind of solitude was cherished—moments stolen away from society's demands, where one might lose themselves in literature by flickering light. These were the hours when the boundary between reader and story grew thin, when shadows danced against leather-bound spines and the world outside ceased to matter. Tonight, you are there.
The audio is woven with binaural beats and sleep frequencies designed to guide you gently toward rest as the night deepens around you.
#AshwoodChronicles #TheHours #SleepStories #AmbientSounds #Nightlistening #CandlelightReading #SleepContent
If you would like to return to these hours — you know where to find us.

item.title: Les Claypool is having a nightmare because of a toothache
item.description:
# Ashwood Chronicles - Les Claypool is having a nightmare because of a toothache
Les Claypool, the virtuoso bassist and founder of Praxis, has long inhabited the darker corners of experimental music, a man whose technical mastery seemed to insulate him from ordinary suffering. Yet even the greatest musicians are subject to the body's small betrayals, and on this particular night, a throbbing molar pulls him down into fever dreams where his instrument becomes strange and unwieldy in his hands. Tonight, you are there.
In the half-light of his restless sleep, discomfort weaves itself through the landscape of memory and sensation. You drift through shadowed rooms where music distorts and reforms, where pain becomes texture, where the boundary between waking and dreaming grows thin and permeable. There is no escape from the body's insistence, only the slow journey through darkness toward dawn.
The audio contains binaural beats and sleep frequencies designed to guide you deeper into rest.
#AshwoodChronicles #SleepStories #LesClaypool #LostWorlds #SleepContent #Binaural #SleeperContent
If you would like to return to these hours — you know where to find us.

item.title: Les Claypool is having a nightmare because of a toothache
item.description:
# Ashwood Chronicles - Les Claypool is having a nightmare because of a toothache
Les Claypool, the virtuoso bassist and founder of Praxis, has long inhabited the darker corners of experimental music, a man whose technical mastery seemed to insulate him from ordinary suffering. Yet even the greatest musicians are subject to the body's small betrayals, and on this particular night, a throbbing molar pulls him down into fever dreams where his instrument becomes strange and unwieldy in his hands. Tonight, you are there.
In the half-light of his restless sleep, discomfort weaves itself through the landscape of memory and sensation. You drift through shadowed rooms where music distorts and reforms, where pain becomes texture, where the boundary between waking and dreaming grows thin and permeable. item.title: Les Claypool and Larry LaLonde discover argentinan choripan and they are in shock
item.description:
# Ashwood Chronicles - YouTube Description
Les Claypool and Larry LaRonde, legendary musicians of experimental rock, find themselves transported to early 20th century Argentina, a nation transformed by waves of immigration and culinary fusion. In the bustling markets of Buenos Aires, they encounter choripán—the humble yet revelatory sandwich that became the soul food of a people. As the aroma of grilled chorizo mingles with the warmth of fresh bread, their astonishment becomes your gateway into a moment of simple, profound discovery.
The sizzle of meat on the grill fades into the gentle murmur of a crowded plaza. Smoke curls through golden afternoon light. You taste salt and smoke on your tongue, feel the weight of bread in your hands, hear the distant tango drifting from a nearby café. Time slows. The world narrows to this single, perfect bite.
This recording features binaural beats and sleep frequencies engineered to guide you toward deep rest and vivid dreaming.
#AshwoodChronicles #SleepContent #AncientLife #BinauraBeats #SleepAudio #HistoricalAMBIENT #GentleAudio
If you would like to return to these hours — you know where to find us.

item.title: a golden retriever dreaming about French Fries
item.description:
# Ashwood Chronicles - Night Worlds Description
Picture a sprawling meadow where golden grasses sway beneath a twilight sky, the air warm and honeyed with the scent of late summer. A gentle creek winds through the landscape, its waters catching the last amber light of dusk, while distant trees blur into indigo shadows. The world here moves slowly—time measured in the soft breathing of the wind and the subtle rustle of leaves, creating a pocket of perfect stillness where dreams feel inevitable.
Our audio incorporates binaural beats and sleep frequencies designed to guide you deeper into rest with each passing moment.
#NightWorlds #SleepStories #AshwoodChronicles #GoldenRetriever #DreamScapes #SleepContent #GentleAudio
If you would like to return to these hours — you know where to find us.

item.title: a golden retriever playing football
item.description:
# The Hours: A Golden Retriever Playing Football
In the autumn of 1925, a remarkable retriever named Champion Duke became the unlikely star of an experimental athletic exhibition that captured the imagination of a small American town. Trainers and spectators alike marveled at the dog's natural grace and instinctive understanding of the game, as if some ancient memory of sport lived in his golden coat. Tonight, you are there.
The audio features binaural beats and sleep frequencies designed to guide you gently into rest as the scene unfolds around you.
#AshwoodChronicles #SleepContent #TheHours #GoldenRetriever #HistoricalSleep #BinaularBeats #SleepStories
If you would like to return to these hours — you know where to find us.
